title: Resolution Requesting the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw Through Municipal Enviroment and Natural Resources Office MENRO) and the General Services Office GSO) to Allow Extension of Operating Hours of the Municipal Recovery Facility (MRF) in View of the Dengue Clean-up Drive Campaign of Every Barangay in the Municipality of Los Baños. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR MARLO PJ A. ALIPON, REE, RMP,MPA, 05/13/22)
